title: Block
description: A Block is a named, reusable section within a Page. It maps from an Operation and has a structural type (list, detail, form, actions, etc.).

name.description: The PascalCase name of the block.

type.description: The structural type of the block.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this block does.

operation.description: The Operation this block maps from, expressed as Resource.Action.

fields.description: The Fields shown or collected in this block.
